name: io.github.IronSecCo/ironclaw
description: Sandboxed shell exec for MCP clients: run untrusted agent commands in a gVisor container.

runtimeArguments.name: --rm
runtimeArguments.description: Remove the container when the MCP session ends (ephemeral by design).

runtimeArguments.name: -i
runtimeArguments.description: Keep stdin open for the MCP stdio transport.

runtimeArguments.name: -v
runtimeArguments.description: IronClaw launches each sandbox_exec run as a sibling gVisor container; it needs the host Docker socket to do so. This grants the MCP server control of the host Docker daemon -- review before enabling.

runtimeArguments.name: --entrypoint
runtimeArguments.description: Override the control-plane daemon entrypoint to run the bundled ironctl MCP server instead.
